_meta.note: This is the structured master resume used by the resume tailor. Update this file whenever you update your resume PDF.

education.school: Boston University, Questrom School of Business

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.title: Analysis of Crime and EMS Response Patterns in New York City
bullets: Led a 5-member multidisciplinary team as Project Manager, achieving a 99% evaluation score for delivering data-backed insights into New York City's public safety trends; delivered actionable recommendations for resource reallocation and response optimization by presenting 15+ visualizations with Matplotlib and Seaborn.

Cleaned, merged, and standardized over 29k shooting, 11k emergency, and 143k arrest records using Pandas and NumPy, enabling borough-level statistical and geospatial analyses to identify crime hotspots and uncover underlying patterns for stakeholder recommendation using over 185,000 entries from NYPD, EMS, and 911 data.

projects.title: Early Momentum Forecasting on Olist e-commerce Marketplace
bullets: Built 5 predictive ML models on 113k transactions to identify top 10% bestsellers within 7–14 days; engineered 9 features, achieved strong ROC-AUC and balanced accuracy using stratified k-fold cross-validation.

Segmented product trajectories into 'Trending/Front-Loaded' vs. 'Late-Bloomer' patterns and validated business hypothesis by revealing an 80/20 Pareto distribution, translating model predictions into actionable go-to-market strategies for marketing and operations teams.

Embedded a Power Automate Teams alert workflow into the report built using Power Query and DAX to track late orders and regional fulfillment performance, enabling faster identification of operational bottlenecks.

projects.title: Spotify Music Streaming Analysis
bullets: Created a complete data pipeline using BigQuery and SQL to merge two datasets of around 1 million tracks; performed EDA identifying key popularity drivers across 50+ regions, generating 18+ data-backed insights.

Designed 2 interactive Tableau dashboards translating multi-dimensional analysis into actionable visualizations (popularity trends, regional streaming patterns, chart longevity dynamics, explicit content trade-offs), enabling content strategists and A&R teams to optimize release timing, playlist positioning, and regional marketing.

projects.title: Trustworthy AI in Healthcare: A Hospital/Pharmacy Supply-Chain Chatbot
bullets: Led development of a chatbot that unified 6,383 guideline chunks from FDA Orange Book, ASHP guidelines, RxNorm API, and 200k+ inventory lots across 80 locations into a single conversational interface, reducing manual query resolution time from 15 minutes to under 10 seconds.

Evaluated 3 production-style modes (retrieval-only, RAG, and LLM-only) over 180 adversarial and ambiguity stress test runs across 30 prompts and multiple temperatures while instrumenting safety guardrails for inventory, drug substitution, and cost queries for frontline clinical users.

experience.title: Software Analyst Engineer
bullets: Developed 9+ interactive webpages using Angular, ensuring alignment with client specifications and project timelines; collaborated with QA team to perform comprehensive UI/UX testing, resolving 45+ inconsistencies by implementing critical debugging within 24-hour SLA to enhance product quality and client satisfaction by 35%.

Engineered production-grade test data with 1,000+ annotated samples and implemented validation protocols establishing accuracy benchmarks; guided model selection and accelerated time-to-production by 2 weeks.

experience.title: Graduate Assistant
bullets: Identified and compiled opportunities tailored to student profiles and coordinated logistics for the NYC Trek by extracting, cleaning, and transforming 3 years of industry contact data to build dashboards displayed on industry-facing websites, supporting seamless engagement between 110+ students and company partners.
